title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup is not present if Charge Case is on latest FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup persists on Home Screen after earbud DFU when case firmware is already up to date
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Ensure the earbuds and charge case are connected to the app.
4. Verify the charge case is already on the latest firmware version.
5. Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds via the app.
6. After the DFU completes, observe the Home screen for any popup or card.
7. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. After the app restarts, observe the Home screen again for any popup or card.
expected: The "Case Update Needed" popup/card should NOT be displayed on the Home screen after the DFU completes or after restarting the app.
